scripts.build: vite build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const outDir='public/build'; const manifestPath=path.join(outDir,'.vite','manifest.json'); const finalManifest=path.join(outDir,'manifest.json'); if (fs.existsSync(manifestPath)) { const manifest=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(manifestPath,'utf8')); fs.copyFileSync(manifestPath, finalManifest); const cssEntry=Object.entries(manifest).find(([key])=>key==='resources/css/app.css')?.[1]?.file; const jsEntry=Object.entries(manifest).find(([key])=>key==='resources/js/app.js')?.[1]?.file; if (cssEntry) { fs.copyFileSync(path.join(outDir,'assets',cssEntry), path.join(outDir,'assets','app.css')); } if (jsEntry) { fs.copyFileSync(path.join(outDir,'assets',jsEntry), path.join(outDir,'assets','app.js')); } console.log('Vite assets prepared for deployment'); }"
